content: LLM enrichment cost pitfalls: Budget controls needed at key/user/team levels with max_budget and budget_duration; without explicit spend tracking costs spiral invisibly; stale pricing data causes tracking inaccuracy; Azure custom deployments need base_model for correct pricing; tag-based attribution essential for identifying which pipelines drive costs; daily spend breakdown enables early anomaly detection; rate limiting via TPM/RPM per key prevents runaway usage; prompt instability means batch results vary between runs requiring versioned prompts.
